Title: Defense in Depth update for NuGet Client
Description: This update adds validation of the package ID and version during package download, in addition to the existing package signature validation.
AffectedVersions: All versions starting from 4.9.0 before 4.9.7, all versions starting from 5.11.0 before 5.11.7, all versions starting from 6.8.0 before 6.8.2, all versions starting from 6.11.0 before 6.11.2, all versions starting from 6.12.0 before 6.12.5, all versions starting from 6.14.0 before 6.14.3, all versions starting from 7.0.0 before 7.0.3, all versions starting from 7.3.0 before 7.3.1, version 7.3.0
